# SMS Wake-on-LAN APK

Download the SMS Wake-on-LAN APK, an Android utility that triggers WOL magic packets from incoming SMS keywords.

Download: https://tanzir71.github.io/android-apk-landing-pages/sms-wake-lan/assets/sms-wake-lan.apk
Canonical: https://tanzir71.github.io/android-apk-landing-pages/sms-wake-lan/
Author: Tanzir Rahman, https://tanziro.com
Package: com.smstowol.wakesms.sms_wake_lan
Version: 1.0.0+1
APK size: 46.47 MB
SHA256: 6ae24e6f3564b9d0d85d02f71bb60437a89541e1c2ed0a2f90e9c3bf0454217f

Important: This APK is vibe-coded, has limited testing, and ships with no warranty. Users should read the permissions and install at their own risk.
